crimson_grape.title: Find Crimson grapes in the Crimson Forest

nether_visit.title: Brew with Nether grapes in a standard Fermentation Barrel

subtitle.text: The Nether grows things the Overworld cannot.

description: Nether Vinery is unsupported but functional.
Two grape types: Crimson (Crimson Forest) and Warped (Warped Forest).
Also found in Nether structure loot.
Important: the Nether Vinery barrel and press are decorative only.
Brew Nether grapes in a standard Vinery Fermentation Barrel.
The Nether's food is different. Harder to reach. Worth having.
→ Find Crimson grapes in Crimson Forest [check]
→ Brew with Nether grapes in Fermentation Barrel [check]
